videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: Gruul is The Answer for Aggro Artifacts
videos.description:
A few weeks back we went about it all wrong for artifact aggression. It seems like Gruul is the shell to help Fizik/Iron Spider pop off as you get to have Patchwork Bestie and more!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-gruul-is-the-answer-for-aggro-artifacts
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7397350#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/ornc6
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/xi9a6

videos.title: The Eluge Saga Means We Never Pay for Spells!
videos.description:

videos.title: Magic, but You Aren't Allowed to Cast Anything | Against the Odds

videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: When No One Could Find the Modern's Best Deck for Years
videos.description:
These days metagames are often solved super quickly, but today we look at the story of how all the pieces to build the best deck in Modern existed for years, but no one figured out how to put them all together!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

#MTG #MagicTheGathering #MTGModern
